posts.raw_content:
> Hello!
>   
> I hope you are all doing well!
>   
> My family and I are still enjoying our new lives in the country and taking full advantage of the peace and quiet. We have three new pets that we've added to the family. A very large German Shepherd pup named Fenrir, who is proving to be a very good guard dog, and has brought us several animal offerings! We also got two kittens for my boys. They named them, Cookie and Waffles. :) It's cute watching them all play and grow together. My eldest son graduated kindergarten back in May. They had a wonderful ceremony for the kiddos complete with a cap and gown. ❤️ My youngest son is now over 2 1/2 and is proving to be an excellent artist. It's quite impressive. My husband continues to work hard for our family, so I am able to take care of the children and household. We are so blessed.
>   
>   
>   
> I know many of you know that the motion to dismiss my charges was denied. I was hopeful that the law would prevail, but our two-tiered justice system thought otherwise. Minnesota will never cease to amaze me. Our freedom of speech is under attack. Europeans are under attack. We see it more and more everyday. It's sickening. It needs to stop. We have to keep fighting. I refuse to let our folk be silenced and erased.
>   
>   
>   
> It's easy to feel alone in this sometimes. I have to constantly remind myself that you're all still out there supporting me, and that I haven't been forgotten.
>   
>   
>   
> My trial is set for July 20th at 9AM. This will be a huge moment for our freedoms. Tribal Order made a playing card of me which has helped cover some of my court costs. If you haven't seen it, I suggest checking it out. It's beautifully made. I am so grateful for them!
>   
>   
>   
> Any additional donations I receive will go towards my attorney fees and the continued protection for my family. I appreciate all of your love and support. Thank you so much!!!
>   
>   
>   
> H ail Victory
>   
>   
>   
> Shiloh

https://www.givesendgo.com/ShilohHendrix
posts.author: uxername27
posts.title: News from Shiloh Hendrix
posts.content:
Hello!

I hope you are all doing well!

My family and I are still enjoying our new lives in the country and taking full advantage of the peace and quiet. We have three new pets that we've added to the family. A very large German Shepherd pup named Fenrir, who is proving to be a very good guard dog, and has brought us several animal offerings! We also got two kittens for my boys. They named them, Cookie and Waffles. :) It's cute watching them all play and grow together. My eldest son graduated kindergarten back in May. They had a wonderful ceremony for the kiddos complete with a cap and gown. ❤️ My youngest son is now over 2 1/2 and is proving to be an excellent artist. It's quite impressive. My husband continues to work hard for our family, so I am able to take care of the children and household. We are so blessed.

I know many of you know that the motion to dismiss my charges was denied. I was hopeful that the law would prevail, but our two-tiered justice system thought otherwise. Minnesota will never cease to amaze me. Our freedom of speech is under attack. Europeans are under attack. We see it more and more everyday. It's sickening. It needs to stop. We have to keep fighting. I refuse to let our folk be silenced and erased.

It's easy to feel alone in this sometimes. I have to constantly remind myself that you're all still out there supporting me, and that I haven't been forgotten.

My trial is set for July 20th at 9AM. This will be a huge moment for our freedoms. Tribal Order made a playing card of me which has helped cover some of my court costs. If you haven't seen it, I suggest checking it out. It's beautifully made. I am so grateful for them!

Any additional donations I receive will go towards my attorney fees and the continued protection for my family. I appreciate all of your love and support. Thank you so much!!!

H ail Victory

Shiloh

https://www.givesendgo.com/ShilohHendrix
